{"action":"opened","issue":{"url":"https://api.github.com/repos/JuliaLang/julia/issues/56193","repository_url":"https://api.github.com/repos/JuliaLang/julia","labels_url":"https://api.github.com/repos/JuliaLang/julia/issues/56193/labels{/name}","comments_url":"https://api.github.com/repos/JuliaLang/julia/issues/56193/comments","events_url":"https://api.github.com/repos/JuliaLang/julia/issues/56193/events","html_url":"https://github.com/JuliaLang/julia/issues/56193","id":2591916137,"node_id":"I_kwDOABkWpM6afYBp","number":56193,"title":"`CC.populate_def_use_map!` doesn't work as expected.","user":{"login":"jumerckx","id":31353884,"node_id":"MDQ6VXNlcjMxMzUzODg0","avatar_url":"https://avatars.githubusercontent.com/u/31353884?v=4","gravatar_id":"","url":"https://api.github.com/users/jumerckx","html_url":"https://github.com/jumerckx","followers_url":"https://api.github.com/users/jumerckx/followers","following_url":"https://api.github.com/users/jumerckx/following{/other_user}","gists_url":"https://api.github.com/users/jumerckx/gists{/gist_id}","starred_url":"https://api.github.com/users/jumerckx/starred{/owner}{/repo}","subscriptions_url":"https://api.github.com/users/jumerckx/subscriptions","organizations_url":"https://api.github.com/users/jumerckx/orgs","repos_url":"https://api.github.com/users/jumerckx/repos","events_url":"https://api.github.com/users/jumerckx/events{/privacy}","received_events_url":"https://api.github.com/users/jumerckx/received_events","type":"User","site_admin":false},"labels":[],"state":"open","locked":false,"assignee":null,"assignees":[],"milestone":null,"comments":0,"created_at":"2024-10-16T13:35:39Z","updated_at":"2024-10-16T13:35:39Z","closed_at":null,"author_association":"NONE","active_lock_reason":null,"body":"MWE:
```julia
using Test

const CC = Core.Compiler

ir, ret = only(Base.code_ircode((Int, ); optimize_until="compact 1") do x
    y = 2*x
    return y
end)

tpdum = CC.TwoPhaseDefUseMap(length(ir.stmts));

CC.populate_def_use_map!(tpdum, ir)

@test !isempty(tpdum.data) # fails, tpdum is empty
```
The problem is the following, as described by @willtebbutt on Slack:
> I'm a bit confused by the use of userefs in populate_def_use_map! , see here: https://github.com/JuliaLang/julia/blob/b19a7c1721f623ae085354889b183622537543b0/base/compiler/ssair/irinterp.jl#L290
> In particular:
> 1. the argument to `userefs` is an `Instruction`, meaning that the relevant flag of the returned `UseRefIterator` will always be set to `false`.
> 2.    The relevant flag being `false` means that no iterations of the linked for loop will ever be performed.
> 3.    Therefore, calling `populate_def_use_map` does not appear to ever modify `tpdum`.
","reactions":{"url":"https://api.github.com/repos/JuliaLang/julia/issues/56193/reactions","total_count":0,"+1":0,"-1":0,"laugh":0,"hooray":0,"confused":0,"heart":0,"rocket":0,"eyes":0},"timeline_url":"https://api.github.com/repos/JuliaLang/julia/issues/56193/timeline","performed_via_github_app":null,"state_reason":null}}

{"action":"created","issue":{"url":"https://api.github.com/repos/JuliaLang/julia/issues/56193","repository_url":"https://api.github.com/repos/JuliaLang/julia","labels_url":"https://api.github.com/repos/JuliaLang/julia/issues/56193/labels{/name}","comments_url":"https://api.github.com/repos/JuliaLang/julia/issues/56193/comments","events_url":"https://api.github.com/repos/JuliaLang/julia/issues/56193/events","html_url":"https://github.com/JuliaLang/julia/issues/56193","id":2591916137,"node_id":"I_kwDOABkWpM6afYBp","number":56193,"title":"`CC.populate_def_use_map!` doesn't work as expected.","user":{"login":"jumerckx","id":31353884,"node_id":"MDQ6VXNlcjMxMzUzODg0","avatar_url":"https://avatars.githubusercontent.com/u/31353884?v=4","gravatar_id":"","url":"https://api.github.com/users/jumerckx","html_url":"https://github.com/jumerckx","followers_url":"https://api.github.com/users/jumerckx/followers","following_url":"https://api.github.com/users/jumerckx/following{/other_user}","gists_url":"https://api.github.com/users/jumerckx/gists{/gist_id}","starred_url":"https://api.github.com/users/jumerckx/starred{/owner}{/repo}","subscriptions_url":"https://api.github.com/users/jumerckx/subscriptions","organizations_url":"https://api.github.com/users/jumerckx/orgs","repos_url":"https://api.github.com/users/jumerckx/repos","events_url":"https://api.github.com/users/jumerckx/events{/privacy}","received_events_url":"https://api.github.com/users/jumerckx/received_events","type":"User","site_admin":false},"labels":[],"state":"open","locked":false,"assignee":null,"assignees":[],"milestone":null,"comments":1,"created_at":"2024-10-16T13:35:39Z","updated_at":"2024-10-16T18:53:01Z","closed_at":null,"author_association":"NONE","active_lock_reason":null,"body":"MWE:
```julia
using Test

const CC = Core.Compiler

ir, ret = only(Base.code_ircode((Int, ); optimize_until="compact 1") do x
    y = 2*x
    return y
end)

tpdum = CC.TwoPhaseDefUseMap(length(ir.stmts));

CC.populate_def_use_map!(tpdum, ir)

@test !isempty(tpdum.data) # fails, tpdum is empty
```
The problem is the following, as described by @willtebbutt on Slack:
> I'm a bit confused by the use of userefs in populate_def_use_map! , see here: https://github.com/JuliaLang/julia/blob/b19a7c1721f623ae085354889b183622537543b0/base/compiler/ssair/irinterp.jl#L290
> In particular:
> 1. the argument to `userefs` is an `Instruction`, meaning that the relevant flag of the returned `UseRefIterator` will always be set to `false`.
> 2.    The relevant flag being `false` means that no iterations of the linked for loop will ever be performed.
> 3.    Therefore, calling `populate_def_use_map` does not appear to ever modify `tpdum`.
","reactions":{"url":"https://api.github.com/repos/JuliaLang/julia/issues/56193/reactions","total_count":1,"+1":1,"-1":0,"laugh":0,"hooray":0,"confused":0,"heart":0,"rocket":0,"eyes":0},"timeline_url":"https://api.github.com/repos/JuliaLang/julia/issues/56193/timeline","performed_via_github_app":null,"state_reason":null},"comment":{"url":"https://api.github.com/repos/JuliaLang/julia/issues/comments/2417670557","html_url":"https://github.com/JuliaLang/julia/issues/56193#issuecomment-2417670557","issue_url":"https://api.github.com/repos/JuliaLang/julia/issues/56193","id":2417670557,"node_id":"IC_kwDOABkWpM6QGrmd","user":{"login":"jumerckx","id":31353884,"node_id":"MDQ6VXNlcjMxMzUzODg0","avatar_url":"https://avatars.githubusercontent.com/u/31353884?v=4","gravatar_id":"","url":"https://api.github.com/users/jumerckx","html_url":"https://github.com/jumerckx","followers_url":"https://api.github.com/users/jumerckx/followers","following_url":"https://api.github.com/users/jumerckx/following{/other_user}","gists_url":"https://api.github.com/users/jumerckx/gists{/gist_id}","starred_url":"https://api.github.com/users/jumerckx/starred{/owner}{/repo}","subscriptions_url":"https://api.github.com/users/jumerckx/subscriptions","organizations_url":"https://api.github.com/users/jumerckx/orgs","repos_url":"https://api.github.com/users/jumerckx/repos","events_url":"https://api.github.com/users/jumerckx/events{/privacy}","received_events_url":"https://api.github.com/users/jumerckx/received_events","type":"User","site_admin":false},"created_at":"2024-10-16T18:52:59Z","updated_at":"2024-10-16T18:52:59Z","author_association":"NONE","body":"That MWE isn't quite right. Looking at `TwoPhaseDefUseMap` in the Julia source, I believe this is supposed to work:
```julia
const CC = Core.Compiler

ir, ret = only(Base.code_ircode((Int, ); optimize_until="compact 1") do x
    y = 2*x
    return y
end)

function def_use_map(ir)
    tpdum = CC.TwoPhaseDefUseMap(length(ir.stmts));
    scanner = CC.BBScanner(ir)
    stmt_ip = CC.BitSetBoundedMinPrioritySet(length(ir.stmts))
    CC.scan!(scanner, false) do inst::CC.Instruction, lstmt::Int, bb::Int
        idx = inst.idx
        stmt = inst[:stmt]
        for ur in CC.userefs(stmt)
            val = ur[]
            if isa(val, Core.SSAValue)
                CC.count!(tpdum, val)
            end
        end
        return true
    end
    CC.complete!(tpdum); CC.push!(scanner.bb_ip, 1)
    CC.populate_def_use_map!(tpdum, ir)
    tpdum
end

def_use_map(ir) # doesn't contain uses
```","reactions":{"url":"https://api.github.com/repos/JuliaLang/julia/issues/comments/2417670557/reactions","total_count":0,"+1":0,"-1":0,"laugh":0,"hooray":0,"confused":0,"heart":0,"rocket":0,"eyes":0},"performed_via_github_app":null}}

```julia
julia> parentmodule(Base.add_float)
Core

julia> Core.add_float
ERROR: UndefVarError: `add_float` not defined in `Core`
Suggestion: check for spelling errors or missing imports.
Stacktrace:
 [1] getproperty(x::Module, f::Symbol)
   @ Base ./Base.jl:42
 [2] top-level scope
   @ REPL[92]:1
```
Now:
```julia
julia> parentmodule(Base.add_float) == Core
true

julia> Core.Intrinsics.add_float
add_float (intrinsic function 12)

```julia
julia> parentmodule(Base.add_float)
Core

julia> Core.add_float
ERROR: UndefVarError: `add_float` not defined in `Core`
Suggestion: check for spelling errors or missing imports.
Stacktrace:
 [1] getproperty(x::Module, f::Symbol)
   @ Base ./Base.jl:42
 [2] top-level scope
   @ REPL[92]:1
```
Now:
```julia
julia> parentmodule(Base.add_float) == Core
true

julia> Core.Intrinsics.add_float
add_float (intrinsic function 12)
```","reactions":{"url":"https://api.github.com/repos/JuliaLang/julia/issues/55847/reactions","total_count":0,"+1":0,"-1":0,"laugh":0,"hooray":0,"confused":0,"heart":0,"rocket":0,"eyes":0},"timeline_url":"https://api.github.com/repos/JuliaLang/julia/issues/55847/timeline","performed_via_github_app":null,"state_reason":null},"comment":{"url":"https://api.github.com/repos/JuliaLang/julia/issues/comments/2368495039","html_url":"https://github.com/JuliaLang/julia/pull/55847#issuecomment-2368495039","issue_url":"https://api.github.com/repos/JuliaLang/julia/issues/55847","id":2368495039,"node_id":"IC_kwDOABkWpM6NLF2_","user":{"login":"jumerckx","id":31353884,"node_id":"MDQ6VXNlcjMxMzUzODg0","avatar_url":"https://avatars.githubusercontent.com/u/31353884?v=4","gravatar_id":"","url":"https://api.github.com/users/jumerckx","html_url":"https://github.com/jumerckx","followers_url":"https://api.github.com/users/jumerckx/followers","following_url":"https://api.github.com/users/jumerckx/following{/other_user}","gists_url":"https://api.github.com/users/jumerckx/gists{/gist_id}","starred_url":"https://api.github.com/users/jumerckx/starred{/owner}{/repo}","subscriptions_url":"https://api.github.com/users/jumerckx/subscriptions","organizations_url":"https://api.github.com/users/jumerckx/orgs","repos_url":"https://api.github.com/users/jumerckx/repos","events_url":"https://api.github.com/users/jumerckx/events{/privacy}","received_events_url":"https://api.github.com/users/jumerckx/received_events","type":"User","site_admin":false},"created_at":"2024-09-23T14:42:28Z","updated_at":"2024-09-23T14:42:28Z","author_association":"NONE","body":"> I can't reproduce your "now" example:

Sorry, something went wrong copying. Should be 
```julia
julia> Base.parentmodule(f::Core.IntrinsicFunction) = Core.Intrinsics

julia> parentmodule(Base.add_float)
Core.Intrinsics
```
such that this works
```julia
parentmodule(Base.add_float).add_float
```","reactions":{"url":"https://api.github.com/repos/JuliaLang/julia/issues/comments/2368495039/reactions","total_count":0,"+1":0,"-1":0,"laugh":0,"hooray":0,"confused":0,"heart":0,"rocket":0,"eyes":0},"performed_via_github_app":null}}
